query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_matches, SUM(CASE WHEN inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched, SUM(CASE WHEN inventoryItemId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unmatched FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131;
